ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-10-2024 Continued To Sep-10-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Declaration Of Neil Peretz In Support Of Application For Default Judgment (Declarations)
Off Calendar Aug-05-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for a request for judgment against Defendant Ronald J. Roschioli, Crown Trading International, LLC and Rys International Group LLC.

Dept.505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" only to be used in compliance with California Government Code Section 69957, commencing at 9:42:58 a.m. and concluding at 10:31:41 a.m. (D505).

Neil Peretz, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff Bluex Trade Inc., A Delaware Corporation
Defendant Ronald J. Roschioli, Crown Trading International, LLC and Rys International Group LLC not appearing.
Witness Sean O'Malley, sworn to testify for the Plaintiff.

Plaintiff's 2nd amended complaint for Fraud, unjust enrichment, et al filed Jul-06-2023.
Order granting service via Secretary of State as to Defendant , Crown Trading International, LLC and Rys International Group LLC filed Dec-27-2023.
Proof of personal service as to Defendant , Crown Trading International, LLC and Rys International Group LLC served Jan-24-2024.
Order granting service by publication as to Defendant Ronald J. Roscioli.
Proof of publication filed Feb-08-2023.
Default entered as to Defendant Ronald J. Roschioli, Crown Trading International, LLC and Rys International Group LLC. on Mar-11-2024.
Dismissal filed as to Defendant Admore's Officeworld, Inc., Crown Forwarding Inc. and Burnie Gurr on Apr-24-2024.
Notice and Motion for Default Prove-Up filed on Jun-17-2024.

The Court confirms with counsel re: witness appearance.
The court confirms receipt of supplemental declarations.
Counsel to provide a summary for a request for default judgment.
Counsel examines witness.
Court cross examines the witness.
Witness confirms that declarations made, exhibits submitted are true and correct.

After hearing the testimony, reviewing the declaration, and considering the evidence, the Court finds that the Plaintiff has proven its prima facie case and rules in favor of the Plaintiff against the Defendants as follows:

Plaintiff shall recover from the Defendants the following:
Damages $399,320.00
Interest $0
Attorney's Fees $39,535.50
Costs $2,705.71
Other $0
Total Judgment $441,561.21

Proposed judgment as modified signed and executed this day.

Parties stipulate the return of the exhibits.

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Aug-05-2024 Granted Per Written Order

Declaration Of Neil Peretz In Support Of Application For Default Judgment (Declarations)
Off Calendar Jul-31-2024 Continued To Aug-05-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:22 am and concluding at 9:44 am

Plaintiff Bluex Trade Inc. is represented by Neil Peretz, Esq.
Defendant Ronald Riscioli not appearing
Defendant Crown International Trading LLC not appearing.
Defendant RYS Internantional Group LLC not appearing.

Plaintiff's counsel makes oral request to waive the appearance of the witness.

The Court Denies Plaintiff's request to waive the appearance of the witness.

The Court Orders Huangyu Lin to be present as a witness at the next calling of the matter.

The Court requires counsel to file a declaration re: Attorney's fees.

The Court Orders the matter continued for the appearance of the witness to August 5, 2024. at 9:30 am in Department 505.
